  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

CD3_EV_CK_SCCM_V1_2

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 18DAA2F2
Recv ID: 18DAF2A2
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: A2
Func Name: SCCM

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "B517",
    "soft": "SCCM_0303",
    "version": "SCCM_0303"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "B517",
    "soft": "SCCM_02b4",
    "version": "SCCM_02b4"
  }
]

  {
